def: A lazy or cowardly person; a rascal. [Obs.] Chaucer.
The slender, hollow thread of a nettling cell or cnida. SeeNettling cell. [Written also ecthoræum.]
A mineral related to the micas, but low in silica and yieldingbrittle folia with pearly luster.
That which has a common center with something else.Its pecular relations to its concentrics. Coleridge.
One who fights with his fists; esp., a professional prizefighter; a boxer.
A grass of the genus Festuca. Fescue grass (Bot.), a genus ofgrasses (Festuca) containing several species of importance inagriculture. Festuca ovina is sheep's fescue; F. elatior is meadowfescue.
